# Antigravity Extension Gate

Antigravity Extension Gate is a hosted remote MCP for Antigravity extension compatibility MCP.

Website: https://antigravityextensiongate.clauxel.com/
Docs pattern reference: https://github.com/clauxel/MiroFish
Primary keyword: Antigravity extension compatibility MCP
Type: MCP
Default plan: team
MCP endpoint: https://antigravityextensiongate.clauxel.com/mcp
Server card: https://antigravityextensiongate.clauxel.com/server-card.json
Registry name: com.clauxel.antigravityextensiongate/antigravityextensiongate-mcp
Tools: check_extension_gate, classify_extension_gap, issue_extension_receipt, suggest_extension_fix, export_extension_audit

Public boundary: docs-only repository; no production source code or secrets.
